params_used.custom_text: // This FSM is designed to handle the item dispensing process in a vending machine. It starts in the IDLE state, waiting for a coin and an item selection. Once both are detected, it transitions to the ITEM_SELECTED state, activating the item dispensing mechanism. After confirming the item has been dispensed, it moves to the ITEM_DISPENSED state, returning the coin and resetting to the IDLE state.
